overall.description: A first-person walk along a foggy waterfront promenade in a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The scene features neon-lit skyscrapers, digital billboards, and distinctive orange-topped streetlights piercing through the haze, with the camera moving from an urban street past palm trees toward an open waterfront view of the illuminated skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy waterfront promenade adjacent to city street

events.description: large digital billboard with 'WET DREAM' text emerges through the fog on the left
path curves gently to the left as the promenade continues

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade beside a street with parked vehicles

entered.detail: modern glass building with curved facade and illuminated windows
tall streetlight with distinctive orange glowing top and bright white lamp
silver metal railing running along the edge of the promenade
large vertical digital screen displaying 'WET DREAM' in pink neon text
tall palm tree silhouetted against the foggy night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night along a waterfront promenade, with a curved modern office building visible through the haze. The camera moves forward past distinctive orange-topped streetlights, revealing a large digital billboard advertising 'WET DREAM' and palm trees lining the path. The wet concrete reflects the artificial lighting while parked vehicles sit along the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront walkway with foggy bay view

events.description: passing under a bright streetlight creates a pool of warm illumination on the wet pavement
turning toward the water to reveal distant fog-shrouded structures across the bay

agents.ego_description: continuing along the foggy promenade, briefly turning to observe the dark water and distant structures

entered.detail: dark water surface barely visible through the thick fog
industrial dock or pier structure silhouetted in the fog across the water

segments.scene_description: Moving past the billboard, the scene opens into a wider waterfront area with palm trees receding into the fog. The camera passes under bright streetlights that cast pools of warm light on the wet concrete, then turns toward the water to reveal fog-shrouded industrial structures across the dark bay. The urban street and initial building disappear behind as the path continues along the open waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront overlook with neon city skyline

events.description: city skyline with illuminated neon signs and billboards comes into full view across the water
moving into an area with dense neon signage reflecting colorful lights off the wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront railing with the vibrant neon city skyline dominating the view

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers covered in illuminated windows and neon advertisements
multiple large digital screens displaying colorful advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: The camera turns back to reveal a stunning cyberpunk city skyline across the water, with towering glass buildings covered in neon signs and digital billboards. The fog diffuses the colorful lights, creating an atmospheric glow. The path continues along the metal railing with streetlights passing by, while the distant palm trees and industrial docks fade from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower waterfront deck with docked boats and city view

events.description: descending slightly toward the water's edge where boats are docked along the pier

agents.ego_description: continuing along the lower waterfront deck with docked boats visible in the water below

entered.detail: small boats and watercraft moored along the waterfront pier

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the waterfront promenade with the neon city skyline now centered across the water. The camera moves past docked boats visible in the dark water below, with the metal railing continuing along the right side. The fog persists, diffusing the vibrant neon lights of the distant skyscrapers as the walk continues along the lower deck.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a foggy waterfront promenade that transitions from a street-side urban walk into an expansive view of a neon-lit cyberpunk skyline. It begins by moving past a curved modern office building and orange-topped streetlights, passing a large digital billboard advertising WET DREAM and palm trees reflecting on wet concrete. As the camera advances, the urban street recedes and the scene opens into a wider waterfront area where the path leads past industrial structures shrouded in haze across a dark bay. The perspective then shifts toward the water to reveal a stunning city skyline of towering glass buildings and diffused neon signs that cast an atmospheric glow through the fog. Finally, the camera continues along a metal railing past docked boats, keeping the vibrant, glowing skyscrapers centered across the water as the walk progresses along the lower deck.
